response.justification: While Bogdan brings exceptional seniority (15+ years) and strong architectural thinking, he is fundamentally misaligned with this role's core requirements. His career is entirely web/backend-focused (TypeScript, Node.js, React, D-lang), with C++ work limited to a 6-month stint in 2014. The role demands deep C++ expertise, industrial automation knowledge, IEC 62443 security standards, and embedded systems experience—none of which appear in his background. Retraining someone from web development into systems/industrial programming would be impractical for a mid-senior position.
strengths: Significantly exceeds experience requirement (15+ years vs. 8-12 required) with multiple senior-level roles demonstrating growth
Strong architectural and systems thinking demonstrated through event-driven platforms (GISCollective), microservices at scale (Dunnhumby), and open-source frameworks
Proven mentoring and knowledge-sharing capability through workshops, courses, and community contributions
concerns: C++ expertise is effectively absent—last real C++ work was 10+ years ago (2014-2015); resume lists primarily TypeScript, Node.js, D-lang, Java, and C#
Zero demonstrated experience with industrial automation, embedded systems, IoT platforms, or industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443, SDL practices)
Career is entirely web/backend-focused; lacks networking, multi-threading, message-broker, and real-time systems expertise required for this industrial role

key_factors.factor: Years of experience and seniority level
